$comment: Standard hooks template: minimal + branch guard + 3-strike failure gate + prettier. Suitable for most TypeScript/JavaScript projects with CI.

hooks.prompt: Before stopping, verify: (1) Does the code work? (2) Are tests passing? (3) Is there anything the user should know? If any check fails, continue working.

$notes: - Branch guard: prevents edits on main/master/production branches
- Failure gate: tracks consecutive Bash failures, warns at 3 strikes
- Stop verification: prompts Claude to self-check before finishing
Branch guard protected branches default to: main, master, production, staging.
Adjust PROTECTED_BRANCHES in branch-guard.sh for your project.
Failure gate resets on any successful command.
After 3 consecutive failures, injects a warning to re-plan.
Replace 'npx prettier' with your formatter (black, gofmt, etc.).
